Hero.tagline: I craft high-performance web & mobile products, lead engineering teams, and ship AI-powered applications — from React & Next.js to Vue, Node.js, and Claude AI.

About.title: About Me
About.bio: A passionate full-stack engineer based in Dubai, crafting modern web applications with attention to detail and performance.
About.bio_1: A full-stack engineer and AI specialist based in Dubai with 3+ years of experience shipping high-performance web and mobile products. I thrive at the intersection of clean architecture and exceptional user experience.
About.bio_2: My core stack spans the React ecosystem — Next.js, React Native, and Vue.js/Nuxt.js — backed by Node.js services and TypeScript throughout. I build fast, accessible, production-grade applications for startups and scale-ups in the UAE and beyond.
About.bio_3: More recently I've been deep in AI-powered product development, integrating Claude AI and other LLMs to ship intelligent applications that move the needle. I also lead engineering teams, set technical direction, and mentor developers.
